name: tensorfeed
description: Real-time AI ecosystem data: news, model pricing, service status, MCP registry, GitHub trending, AI papers, USGS earthquakes, NWS weather alerts, daily agent-ecosystem opportunity scan.
long_description:
TensorFeed gives Claude live, machine-readable insight into the AI industry plus public-domain US-government data feeds. 45 tools across two tiers.

Free tier (no key, no payment): AI news from 50+ sources, current model pricing across labs, AI service status with 2-minute polling and downtime detection, model deprecation tracking, MCP registry snapshots, GitHub/npm/PyPI trending, arXiv + Semantic Scholar + Hugging Face daily papers, Reddit AI threads, daily AI ecosystem brief, USGS recent earthquakes (5 magnitude buckets x 4 time windows), NWS active US weather alerts (filterable by state, event, severity), and a daily agent-ecosystem opportunity scan across Anthropic / OpenAI / Microsoft / ModelContextProtocol / HuggingFace / LangChain / frontier-lab orgs plus MCP, x402, and skill keyword sweeps.

Premium tier (USDC on Base via x402, 1-3 credits per call): smart routing recommendations, multi-day pricing/benchmark/status/uptime time series, leaderboard rankings, agents directory, what's-new digest, model comparison, provider deep-dives, news search, cost projection, webhook watches with daily/weekly digests, latency probe history, MCP registry growth series.

Covered by AFTA, an open standard for fair-trade agent APIs: every paid call returns an Ed25519-signed receipt, and code-enforced no-charge paths protect the agent from being billed for upstream errors. Welcome bonus of 50 free credits on first wallet payment, no accounts.
